query: mutation CreateDiscussion($input: CreateDiscussionInput!) { createDiscussion(input: $input) { discussion { title url } } }

input.title: Architecture Overview: LaravelPizza System Design
input.body:
## Architecture Overview

### Tech Stack

- **Laravel 12** - Framework PHP
- **Filament 5** - Admin panel
- **Livewire/Volt** - Interactivity
- **Folio** - File-based routing
- **Tailwind CSS** - Styling
- **nwidart/modules** - Modular architecture

### Frontend (Frontoffice)

**NO Controllers, NO Routes in web.php**

- CMS-Driven Pages (JSON)
- Folio + Volt
- Block Components

### Backend (Admin)

- Filament Resources
- XotBase classes
- Actions (Spatie QueueableAction)

### Multi-Tenancy

- Central Database
- Tenant-specific databases
- Dynamic module connections

### Database

- MySQL (tenant + user)
- Module-specific connections
- Migrations per module

### Quality Gates

- PHPStan Level 10
- Laravel Pint
- Pest Testing

### Reference

- CLAUDE.md: Architettura completa
- Issue #77: PHPStan
